zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria de Portugal y de Castilla於1313年4月6日出生在葡萄牙埃沃拉埃沃拉時，她的父親Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal22歲，母親Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal20歲。她於1328年6月24日與Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla在葡萄牙瓜亞達阿爾法亞斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1357年1月18日在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria de Portugal y de Castilla于1313年4月6日出生在葡萄牙埃沃拉埃沃拉时，她的父亲Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal22岁，母亲Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal20岁。她于1328年6月24日与Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla在葡萄牙瓜亞達阿爾法亞斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1357年1月18日在她的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: Portugal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Salvador, Alberto, Alejandra, Alejandro, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Luis, Manuel.  Portuguese Aderito.

Spanish, Portuguese, Catalan, French, English (Lincolnshire), and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): ethnic name or habitational name for someone from Portugal or who had connections with Portugal. The name of the country derives from Late Latin Portucale, originally denoting the district around Oporto (Portus Cales, named with Latin portus ‘port, harbor’ + Cales, the ancient name of the city). In some cases the surname may be simply a nickname for someone who had business connections with Portugal. The English surname is a rare variant of Pettengill .

variants.name: Pettengill
meanings: English: medieval English name for someone from Portugal (see Portugal ), from Middle English Portingal(e) ‘Portugal’ (Old French Portugalois), later also meaning ‘Portuguese’.

variants.name: Portal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Amado, Arnoldo, Caridad, Jose, Norberto, Ricardo, Rosa Elena, Tomas.  Portuguese Amadeu.  Jewish Arie, Ber, Shlomo, Yael, Ziva.  French Marcelle, Andre, Jean Luc.

Spanish, Catalan, Galician, Portuguese, southern French, and Jewish (Sephardic): topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town, typically the gatekeeper (from a word, Spanish portal, southern French porta(i)l, meaning ‘gate’); or a habitational name from any of the places in Portugal, Galicia, and France named Portal or, in France, Le Portal.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly a shortened form of   Portugal  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Maria de Portugal y de Castilla was born on 6 April 1313, in Évora, Évora, Portugal, her father, Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal, was 22 and her mother, Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, was 20. She married Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla on 24 June 1328, in Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 18 January 1357, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria de Portugal y de Castilla est née le 6 avril 1313, à Évora, Évora, Portugal, son père, Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla le 24 juin 1328, à Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 janvier 1357, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria de Portugal y de Castilla am 6. April 1313 in Évora, Évora, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal 22 und ihre Mutter Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal 20. Sie hat am 24. Juni 1328 in Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. Januar 1357 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria de Portugal y de Castilla è nata il il 6 aprile 1313 nel Évora, Évora, Portogallo, sua padre, Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla il 24 giugno 1328, nel Alfaiates, Guarda, Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 18 gennaio 1357, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria de Portugal y de Castilla nasceu em 6 de abril de 1313, em Évora, Évora, Portugal, seu pai, Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla em 24 de junho de 1328, em Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria de Portugal y de Castilla родилась 6 апреля 1313 г. в местности eвора, eвора, Португалия, её отцу по имени Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla 24 июня 1328 г. в местности алфеиэитс, гуарда, Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 18 января 1357 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria de Portugal y de Castilla nació el 6 de abril de 1313, en Évora, Évora, Portugal, su papá, Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla el 24 de junio de 1328, en Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 18 de enero de 1357, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Sevilla, Andalucía, España.
